world.title: Marjane Satrapi, Iranian-French Author Of Graphic Novel 'Persepolis', Dies Aged 56
world.description: Marjane Satrapi, the Iranian-French artist, filmmaker and author of the autobiographical graphic novel "Persepolis", has died aged 56.

economy.description:
Escalating Middle East tensions could fuel inflation fears, complicating Fed rate decisions and prompting defensive shifts in investment strategies.
The post Wall Street ends lower as Middle East tensions escalate, dragging Bitcoin to $73K appeared first on C…

economy.title: S&P 500 Edges Higher in Quiet Session as Small Caps Lead Market Rotation
economy.description: The S&P 500 posted a modest gain amid geopolitical tensions, with small-cap stocks outperforming. Investors focus on economic indicators and market rotation as technology shares face pressure.

economy.title: Benchmark raises $2 billion for new VC funds
economy.description: Benchmark Capital has effectively closed two new funds: $750 million for its 12th flagship early-stage strategy, and $1.25b for its first growth fund.

economy.title: Russell 2000 Rises 0.9% as Small Caps Extend Outperformance Amid Market Rotation
economy.description: The Russell 2000 Index rose by 0.90%, reflecting a shift towards small-cap stocks amid economic changes. The index benefits from lower interest rates and domestic economic improvements, outperforming larger indices.

economy.title: Five Below nixes ‘Five Beyond’ store section
economy.description: The retailer — which reported a 32% sales bump for Q1 thanks to viral squishy toys — moved the higher priced inventory in line with the rest of the store.

economy.title: Bank of England told staff should be working from desks, not sun loungers after it emerges they can work from abroad for two months a year
economy.description: Bank of England staff have been told to work from 'desks, not sun loungers', after it emerged they can work from abroad for two months a year.

economy.title: ‘Big fall’ in GDP but ‘positive signs’ in domestic economy, says CSO
economy.description: Ireland’s GDP surged by 9.4% in Q1 last year, according to the CSO, and is now “unwinding” after those increases.

economy.title: Destination XL is reevaluating its merger with FullBeauty
economy.description: A week after rejecting a take-private offer, the company’s board said the merger’s existing terms were not in its stockholders’ best interests.
